Who I Am

About Me

Hi, I'm Arya Ojha — a free spirit with an insatiable hunger for knowledge, experience, and the full richness of life.

I'm an English Honours graduate who found herself equally fascinated by stories and statistics. Words have always been my first language, but data gave me a second one. Together, they let me say things worth hearing.

I completed a Microsoft Elevate internship in Power BI, earned certifications across Microsoft and IBM, and have hands-on experience in content writing, digital marketing, data visualization, and AI-assisted workflows — all while keeping curiosity at the centre of everything.

I don't believe in settling for one lane. I'm a writer, analyst, dancer, learner — and I'm just getting started.

Content Writing Digital Marketing Power BI Data Analytics Microsoft Copilot Generative AI SEO Brand Storytelling Research

What I've Built

My Projects

01

YouTube Channel Analytics Dashboard

Power BI capstone from Microsoft Elevate — an interactive dashboard tracking views, watch time, subscriber growth, and audience demographics using DAX, Data Modeling, and Power Query.

02

Content Writing Portfolio

A curated collection of blogs, articles, newsletters, and social media content spanning B2B and B2C formats — written with precision, adapted for brand voice.

Research Work

Academic and independent research combining literary analysis with structured argumentation — translating complex ideas into clear, credible, and compelling narratives.

Beyond the Resume

Hobbies

💃 Dance

Dance isn't a hobby for me — it's a conversation I have with the universe. Every step is a word, every sequence a sentence. It's where data and deadlines dissolve and pure expression takes over.

I've performed at events, weddings, and college functions — each time rediscovering why movement is one of the oldest and most honest forms of storytelling.

"When in doubt, dance it out."
